data.title: Binance Wallet Bedrock TGE Surpasses Fundraising Target by 54x, Raising 110,525 BNB
data.description: Binance Wallet’s exclusive Token Generation Event (TGE) for Bedrock, a multi-asset liquid staking protocol, has significantly outperformed expectations, raising 110,525 BNB— 54 times the original goal of 2,018.53 BNB within just 50 minutes.Key HighlightsEvent Partners: Binance Wallet & PancakeSwapTarget Fundraising Amount: 2,018.53 BNBTotal Raised: 110,525 BNBOversubscription: 54x in 50 minutes

data.title: Bitcoin Price Nears Key Liquidation Levels as $88K and $84K Mark Critical Points
data.description: According to Coinglass data, Bitcoin’s price movement is approaching high-impact liquidation zones on mainstream centralized exchanges (CEXs).Key Liquidation Levels:If Bitcoin surpasses $88,000, short orders worth $371 million could be liquidated across major CEXs.If Bitcoin drops below $84,000, long orders worth $422 million could face liquidation.Understanding the Liquidation Chart:The liquidation chart does not indicate the exact number of contracts or their value but rather the relative importance of each liquidation cluster.Larger liquidation columns signal a higher likelihood of significant price movements when Bitcoin reaches a particular level.The stronger the liquidation cluster, the more volatile Bitcoin’s price reaction is expected to be.

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Experiences Decline Amid Mixed Asset Performance
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index has seen a decrease in its trading value, currently standing at 2712.19. This marks a 1.0% decline, equivalent to a drop of 26.22 points, since the previous trading session at 4 p.m. ET on Wednesday. The index, which is a comprehensive measure of the cryptocurrency market, reflects the performance of 20 major digital assets across various platforms worldwide.

Among the assets within the CoinDesk 20, only three have shown positive movement. Bitcoin Cash (BCH) leads with a 1.0% increase, followed by Chainlink (LINK) with a 0.6% rise. These gains, however, are overshadowed by the declines observed in other assets. Avalanche (AVAX) has experienced a significant drop of 4.5%, while Polkadot (DOT) has decreased by 3.7%. These fluctuations highlight the volatility and dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency market, as assets continue to respond to various market forces and investor sentiments.

The CoinDesk 20 Index serves as a key indicator for the cryptocurrency market, offering insights into the performance of leading digital assets. It is traded across multiple platforms and regions, providing a broad-based view of the market's current state. As the market continues to evolve, the index remains a valuable tool for investors and analysts seeking to understand the trends and movements within the digital asset space.

data.title: Analyst PlanB Discusses Bitcoin Market Phases
data.description: According to Odaily, analyst PlanB has released a chart indicating that a true bull market has yet to emerge. In the comments section, he explained that he categorizes the rebound of Bitcoin's price from the absolute bottom of the last bear market at $15,000 to approximately $40,000 as an accumulation phase. The progression from $40,000 to the current $100,000 could be considered an early bull market.

data.title: Monad testnet is back online
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Monad co-founder Keone Hon said that the test network has resumed operation. In addition, the network has added 15 nodes, bringing the total number of nodes to 72. A few nodes are still not online, but should be restored soon. The team is working hard to improve the robustness of the network upgrade.

data.title: Mira Network ecosystem reaches 2.5 million users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official data, the AI ​​infrastructure Mira Network ecosystem has reached 2.5 million users and processes 2 billion tokens per day. Mira Network is committed to promoting the development of AI infrastructure, eliminating hallucinations and biases to ensure that AI systems have higher accuracy and lower error rates. Through a decentralized verification mechanism, Mira provides developers with tools to help them build more reliable AI-driven applications.

data.title: BTC breaks through 86,000 USDT, up 2.08% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 86,000 USDT and is now at 86,021.7 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 2.08%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Real estate tokenization company Manifest completes $2.5 million financing, led by VanEck Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Real estate tokenization company Manifest has completed a $2.5 million financing, led by VanEck Ventures, with participation from Compound, Lattice Fund and SALT. It is reported that Manifest is a company dedicated to introducing US private equity real estate to the blockchain, aiming to combine real estate and decentralized finance. Manifest said that in the future it will also seek to expand its token issuance to other assets that can only be acquired through private equity. (Blockworks)

data.title: Trust Wallet Offers Fee-Free BNB Smart Chain Transactions for Limited Time
data.description: According to PANews, Trust Wallet has announced a promotional period from March 20, 2025, at 17:00 to March 27, 2025, at 16:00 (UTC+8), during which all token transactions on the BNB Smart Chain (BSC) will be exempt from transaction provider fees. This initiative is supported by 1inch and 0x. While users will still be responsible for network or gas fees, the transaction provider fees will be completely waived. This offer is exclusively available for transactions conducted through the Trust Wallet app's trading feature, and third-party dApp transactions are not eligible.

data.title: PancakeSwap Surpasses Major Protocols in Daily Revenue
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Defillama indicates that PancakeSwap's revenue reached $4.56 million in the past 24 hours. This achievement places it third on the cryptocurrency revenue leaderboard, surpassing notable protocols and blockchains such as Jupiter, Tron, Lido, and Uniswap.

Tether and Circle secured the top two positions with 24-hour revenues of $18.35 million and $6.16 million, respectively.
